sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97434" key="stufo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">στῡφ-ότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n97434.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">thickness, denseness</tr_>, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μανότης</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.96f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
